咪撚痴線啦

做開gym真係好難停至少我唔得
我依家避開多人時間去
有陣時去好似包場咁
唯有真係用機/械/槓之前噴下消毒酒精
正常gym room都有架嗎
揸住支野周圍噴啦

replies.msg:
我4ward
so far幾滿意，可能細細間，又無分店，細節上處理得幾好。

I heartily recommend that you join the eight year membership at pure fitness. My cousin who's a personal trainer there recommended me taking caesin protein before bed because it's slow digesting which extends the release of amino acids to muscle tissue. He thoroughly recommended the brand American Bodybuilding to me. I thoroughly recommend you should take weight gainer and soy protein since they're ideal for muscle growth. I would personally recommend the brand ABB as well. It's recommended that you take weight gainer before your gym session, soy protein immediately after your workout and caesin protein before you go to bed because they help you gain muscle and strength. I would definitely recommend pure fitness because the membership grants you access to the swimming pool as well as the gym and sauna room. The membership costs one thousand four hundred dollars a month which is well worth it for the wide range of facilities you can use. May I suggest that you think carefully before buying supplements? Don't waste money on useless supplements.
